name: read_twx
short_description: Read timing results from Trace STA tool
full_help:
read_twx

Description: 
Read timing results from Trace STA tool

Syntax: 
read_twx  [-cell <arg>] [-pblock <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <name> <file>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-cell]     Interpret names in the report file as relative to the specified
              cell
  [-pblock]   Interpret names in the report file as relative to the specified
              pblock
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>      Name for the set of results
  <file>      Name of the Trace import file

Categories: 
FileIO

arguments.description: Interpret names in the report file as relative to the specified cell
